meta.title: Portfolio

meta.title: About Me
meta.description: Jérémie, a Media Engineering student at HEIG-VD, creates seamless full-stack web experiences with a blend of creativity and technical skills. Reach out for collaboration or web development insights.

about.iStudy: Graduated with a Bachelor's degree in
about.iStudy2: , with a passion for both the technical and creative sides of web development. My journey started with a curiosity for how things work, which grew into a love for building websites that not only function well but look and feel great.

about.loveAbout: What I love about full-stack development is bringing ideas to life from start to finish — building efficient back-end systems while creating seamless, user-centered front-end experiences. It’s the blend of logic and creativity that drives me.
about.getInTouch2: If you’d like to collaborate on a project, have any questions, or just want to chat about web development or UI & UX, feel free to reach out! I’m always open to new opportunities and love connecting with like-minded people. You can contact me via
